summary: One-line data fix correctly updates bad_nrs from [27, 28, ...] to [28, 29, ...]. Kernel syscall table confirms syscall 27 is PROCESS_SET_SYSCALL_FILTER (valid, handled in dispatch match arm, returns InvalidArgument for bad args — not UnknownSyscall). Syscall 28 is the first unhandled number (falls through to the _ => UnknownSyscall arm). The diff is minimal, correct, and the worker verified all 1,698 unit tests pass plus stress.sh exit 0.
